archetypes.name: spott evidence replay
archetypes.trigger: spott signal changes while publicly context is stale
archetypes.expected: block release until cited evidence is regenerated

archetypes.name: publicly boundary probe
archetypes.trigger: publicly handoff crosses a policy or trust boundary
archetypes.expected: route to reviewer with evidence packet

archetypes.name: committed regression harness
archetypes.trigger: committed behavior regresses against the last accepted fixture
archetypes.expected: open a regression issue with trace and benchmark delta

archetypes.name: agentic operator packet
archetypes.trigger: agentic output needs a human-readable audit packet
archetypes.expected: accept only if decision claims cite fixture evidence
